title: Ratio
claim: A ratio compares two quantities by expressing how much of one quantity corresponds to another.
proof: Ratios arise by comparing quantities through division or repeated correspondence between two measured amounts.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by comparing quantities in mixtures, lengths, counts, or repeated groups.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Ratios arise by comparing quantities through division or repeated correspondence between two measured amounts.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Ratios arise by comparing quantities through division or repeated correspondence between two measured amounts.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Can be rediscovered by comparing quantities in mixtures, lengths, counts, or repeated groups.
